problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.
